query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `construtoras` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `nome` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `logoUrl` text,
  `ativo` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `construtoras_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `materiais` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `tipo` enum('book','foto','tabela') NOT NULL,
  `nome` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `url` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `materiais_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tabeloes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `construtoraId` int NOT NULL,
  `mes` int NOT NULL,
  `ano` int NOT NULL,
  `drivePdfUrl` text NOT NULL,
  `s3PdfUrl` text,
  `statusProcessamento` enum('pendente','processando','concluido','erro') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `erroMensagem` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `tabeloes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `historicos_precos` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `mes` int NOT NULL,
  `ano` int NOT NULL,
  `precoMinimo` decimal(12,2),
  `precoMaximo` decimal(12,2),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `historicos_precos_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `logs_sincronizacao` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `tipo` enum('importacao','processamento') NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('sucesso','erro') NOT NULL,
  `mensagem` text,
  `detalhes` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `logs_sincronizacao_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
